assertions.text: The agent searches the external awesome-claude-skills catalog for matching skills.
The agent also searches the SimonK Stack INDEX.md for relevant skills.
The agent recommends matching skills to the user.
The slash command invokes the skill discovery workflow.
The agent returns recommended skills from the catalog and INDEX.md.
The agent searches both awesome-claude-skills and the SimonK Stack INDEX.md.
The agent recommends matching skills based on the search.
